prd.oneLiner: Connect pre-registration, host approval, QR check-in and check-out, visit history, and operations reporting.
prd.goal: Move 80% of visitor registrations to pre-registration and reduce on-site registration time by 50%.
prd.whyNow: Visitor details and host confirmation are scattered across chat and paper logs, delaying security and reception.
prd.problem: Visitor details and host confirmation are scattered across chat and paper logs, delaying security and reception.
prd.solution: Connect pre-registration, host approval, QR check-in and check-out, visit history, and operations reporting.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Employee host
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Visitor details and host confirmation are scattered across chat and paper logs, delaying security and reception.

targets.name: Reception and workplace operator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Visitor details and host confirmation are scattered across chat and paper logs, delaying security and reception.

scenarios.text: Employee host completes visitor pre-registration and checks progress.
Reception and workplace operator reviews visitor activity and security operations reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Move 80% of visitor registrations to pre-registration and reduce on-site registration time by 50%.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Visitor activity and security operations reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
